channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Manhole erupting water, 19th May
item.description:
By the pedestrian crossing on Bishops Cleeve bypass, adjacent to Stoke Road. Apparently unsanitary. Pedestrian crossing unusable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th May
item.description:
Customer reports that the current refuse collection vehicle may be stopped at the location due to the overhanging trees making contact with their mirrors/the vehicle. Please can these be cut back.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing manhole during heavy rain, 19th May
item.description:
Outside Andrews estate agents in the pavement, near the alley towards tesco

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Church Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 19th May
item.description:
Blocked drain and seems to be a lot of stuff built up inside the drain. Needs clearing
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street lighting in the entire section of road until you reach the corner, 19th May
item.description:
The whole stretch of road from the traffic bollard to the corner has no street lighting - it is therefore total darkness and a very dangerous section of road where people are at risk of attack or accident - it needs some lighting added as soon as possible, as there has been nothing there for over 5 years now!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
PLEASE CUT BACK HEDGE TO BOUNDARY ON BOTH SIDES OF FOOTPATH 7m FOOTPATH CLOSURE MARKED (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th May
item.description:
Large branch at this location and stagecoach have called the police to say it almost smashed the top deck of the bus. This could be down to the rain making the bow heavier. Appreciate this will not be a 2hr as there was no suggestion the branch has snapped and it was still in the tree.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 19th May
item.description:
Replace corroded gully grate and frame 600mm x 400mm x 100mm Traffic Lights TM Outside number 1 (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
3 way stop and go plus temporary footway closure 28 day please cut back overgrown tree branches hanging over footway approx 3 meters high x 5 meters wide (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate post out of aline so gate can't be safely shut and closed, 19th May
item.description:
What3words Crunch.gallons.cover The gate is on the footpath to the railway line animals can run through the gate or even children

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Butt's Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
PLEASE CUT BACK HEDGE AND VEGETATION TO BOUNDARY 5m FOOTPATH CLOSURE MARKED (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th May
item.description:
Dead tree not replaced - tree was cut to a stump about a year ago and has not been replaced or removed. Others have been replaced but the tall stump of the dead tree remains. Could you replace it please
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 400x400x40mm tarmac patch no photos (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 19th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 1400x400x40mm tarmac patch (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole at junction that not fixed properly, 19th May
item.description:
The MASSIVE pothole at this junction that you didn't fix properly the first time has failed again, just fix it right for once instead of wasting tax-payers money!!!!!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98-106, Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown growth back to boundary approx 3 metres x 2 metres footway closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 19th May
item.description:
Perm repair Cw depression 2000x1000x50mm approx 3 way lights (CW10 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 19th May
item.description:
Nwd Cw depression 2000x1000x50mm approx unmarked 3 way stop and go (CW10 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
NWD GIVE AND TAKE PLEASE REMOVE X1 BROKEN TREE BRANCH FROM THE GRASS VERGE/ FOOTWAY APPROX 3 metres x2 meters (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th May
item.description:
PLEASE CUT BACK HEDGE TO BOUNDARY ON BOTH SIDES OF FOOTPATH 31m FOOTPATH CLOSURE MARKED (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet
